## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or fixture update
- [ ] Maintenance

## Changed areas

- [ ] `SKILL.md` routing or trigger behavior
- [ ] `references/` artifact standards or workflow packs
- [ ] `README.md` / `README.zh-CN.md` / `INDEX.md`
- [ ] `evals/` fixtures or expected outputs
- [ ] `cases/` public evidence drafts
- [ ] `scripts/` validation utilities
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] Not run
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate-evals.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate-cases.py`
- [ ] Manual review

Notes:


## Checklist

- [ ] I kept runtime loading narrow and avoided unrelated reference bloat.
- [ ] I separated evidence-backed rules from examples or suggestions.
- [ ] I updated README-facing docs when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated evals or cases when routing, output shape, or validation behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include private notes, local validation output, or copied project-specific facts.
